items.title: Gemini Hires Goldmans, Citi, Morgan Stanley and Cantor as Lead Bookrunners for Its IPO
items.description: The company said its net revenue for the first six months of 2025 was $67.9 million, against a net loss of $282.5 million.

items.title: Goldman Sachs constructs 14-floor Texas campus with fitness center and childcare facilities
items.description: Goldman Sachs constructs new Texas office campus to house over 5,000 employees with fitness center, cafe, childcare and underground parking by 2028
